next_steps: Start empiric broad-spectrum intravenous antibiotics (e.g., ceftriaxone and vancomycin)
Obtain CBC with differential, inflammatory markers (CRP, ESR), and urinalysis
Consult pediatric infectious disease and cardiology
Perform an echocardiogram to evaluate for coronary artery aneurysms
Initiate intravenous immunoglobulin (IVIG) if Kawasaki disease remains the leading diagnosis
